ocr.text: In the fiscal year 2024, Vinci SA's BIM adoption statistics reveal a comprehensive overview across various project types,
including Residential with a BIM Adoption Rate of 75%, Implementation Phase in Planning, Training Status as Completed, and
a Cost Overview of $1.5M; Commercial with a 60% BIM Adoption Rate, Design Phase, InProgress Training Status, and a Cost
Overview of $2.3M; and Infrastructure at 80% BIM Adoption Rate, Execution Phase, NotStarted Training Status, and a Cost
Overview of $3.0M. The Total Projects stand at 215 with an Average Adoption of 72%, Training Completed at 120, and
Funding Status as Approved with a Total Cost of $5.8M; Pending status reflects 10 issues with a Budget Utilization of 85% and
95% Issues Resolved. The Total Workforce comprises 350, including 50 BIM Specialists, with 15 Ongoing Projects, Projected
Growth at 10%, Market Share of 25%, and Client Satisfaction at 90%.
